subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! On this day from the blessed Lote-Tree was heard this utterance: "Blessed is the servant who hath inhaled the fragrance of My garment and clung thereto." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی امروز از سدره مبارکه اینکلمه اصغا شد طوبی لعبد وجد عرف قمیصی و تشبث
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power of the Manifestation of God
